guest@iknoway:~$
  • ./about
  • ./anime
  • ./movies
  • ./contact
theme --random
guest@iknoway:~$ neofetch --ascii ./iknoway.txt
 _ _  __            __          __
(_) |/ / _ __   ___ \ \        / /_ _ _   _
 | | ' / | '_ \ / _ \ \ \  /\  / / _` | | | |
 | | . \ | | | | (_) | \ \/  \/ / (_| | |_| |

                                        __/ |
                                       |___/
guest@iknoway:~$ id -un
 
guest@iknoway:~$ cat ~/profile/role.txt
 
guest@iknoway:~$ fold -s ~/profile/tagline.txt
// ── about.sh ──

$ whoami

    // ── anime_collection ──

    $ ls ~/anime

    // ── movie_collection ──

    $ ls ~/cinema

    // ── contact.sh ──

    $ ping iknoway

    PID 2026 | uptime 10+ years | iKnoWay
